Amended Notice Of Motion To Approve Consent Judgment

MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW'S AMENDED MOTION TO APPROVE CONSENT JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Ellison Folk, Esq. of Shute, Mihaly & Weinberger LLP 552-7272 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as a courtesy copy of terms of settlement was provided. Upon further review, the Court granted the motion. Order and judgment signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
